title: Energizer Eco-Halogen Linear 120w = 150w 78mm Halogen Lamp/Bulb for Floodlight, TP-S5160
features: Energy-efficient: The Energizer ECO Halogen120W Linear Light Bulb uses less energy than traditional halogen bulbs, saving you money on your electricity bill.
Bright and clear: With a 150 W equivalent output, these halogen light bulbs provide a bright and clear light for outdoor security lighting.
Long-lasting: These 120w R7s bulbs have a long lifespan, so you wont have to worry about constantly replacing your outdoor light bulbs.
Easy to install: The linear R7s design of these halogen bulbs makes them easy to install in outdoor security light fixtures.
Reliable performance: The Energizer ECO Halogen 400W Linear Light Bulbs provide consistent and reliable performance for your outdoor lighting needs.
description: Upgrade your outdoor lighting with the Energizer ECO Halogen 120W (150W Equivalent) Linear Light Bulb. This pack of white bulbs provides bright and efficient lighting for all your security and outdoor lighting needs. These halogen bulbs are designed to be energy-efficient, lasting up to 2000,hours, saving you money on energy costs in the long run. The R7s base fits most standard outdoor light fixtures, making it easy to replace your old bulbs with these high-quality Energizer bulbs. The 120W power output is equivalent to a traditional 150W bulb, providing ample brightness for any security or outdoor lighting setup. Whether youre looking to illuminate your driveway, backyard, or commercial property, the Energizer ECO Halogen Light Bulbs are the perfect choice. Say goodbye to dim and inefficient outdoor lighting and upgrade to these powerful and reliable R7s bulbs today. Trust in the reliability and reputation of the Energizer brand for all your lighting needs. Invest in quality outdoor light bulbs that will keep you safe and secure while saving you money on energy costs in the long run.

specifications_table.Specific Uses: [INF] Illuminating driveways, backyard lighting, commercial property lighting
